headline.text: L1 closed construction contamination after tent relocation, but L3 ML1 tempering forced *5 pauses* and a remelt spanning over 2 hours.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 successfully relocated the construction tent on S2, cleaned and swabbed the area, and restarted at 11:51 — closing the week-long contamination issue. BET pouches arrived 4 hours late and had a PO issue but were received by 15:01. S3 metal detector faulted briefly at 23:46 and recovered in 9 minutes. Third shift prepped for Monday BET pouch run and completed Level 1 cleans.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 reported socks down at 10:20 with no follow-up detail. Otherwise quiet across the plant.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 tempering instability forced 5 pauses between 14:47 and 21:23, including a full remelt cycle from 16:04 to 17:25 — over 2 hours of lost production. Line eventually stabilized on third shift and completed Level 2 clean. ML4 replaced a damaged TG5 belt at 07:14 after it caused intermittent stops and finished Level 2 clean.

notes.text: Third shift prepared S2 for Monday BET pouch run: installed decorator and mini temper unit, set up matrixes, positioned salt Hapman, cleaned drains where tent was relocated, and ran belt washers on Tunnel 2 (45 min) and Tunnel 3 (1 hour).

closed_today.title: S2 line shut down for construction contamination in production area
closed_today.resolution_comment: Tent relocation completed successfully on 05/16. Area mopped twice, QA swabs passed, line restarted at 11:51. Permanent tarps, cones, and foot sprayers installed to prevent future contamination. Justin Garner at 10:17: "Tent is moved, 2 new tarps are up on the east and west side where the tent was and cones are in place… QA will take swabs and we will uncover the line and start running." Line running normally with contamination controls in place.

closed_today.title: BET pouches arrived 4 hours late with PO system issue blocking receipt
closed_today.summary: BET pouches arrived 4 hours late from supplier, then PO system blocked receipt for another hour — total 7-hour delay from expected delivery to received status.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Pouches received at 15:01 after Sunny resolved PO issue — "We got it, thank you, Sunny! Pouches have now been received."

closed_today.title: S3 metal detector fault — 9-minute outage
closed_today.summary: Metal detector faulted at 23:46 and recovered 9 minutes later with maintenance assistance — brief interruption with no extended impact.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Metal detector working again at 23:55 — "The metal detector has worked again"

closed_today.title: ML4 TG5 damaged belt causing intermittent line stops
closed_today.summary: TG5 belt damage caused intermittent line stops during startup — maintenance replaced belt in 21 minutes and line resumed normal operation.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Belt replaced at 07:14 — "Belt has been replaced"

opened_today.title: BET pouches arrived 4 hours late with PO system issue blocking receipt
opened_today.summary: BET pouches arrived 4 hours late from supplier, then PO system blocked receipt for another hour — total 7-hour delay from expected delivery to received status.

opened_today.title: S3 metal detector fault — 9-minute outage
opened_today.summary: Metal detector faulted at 23:46 and recovered 9 minutes later with maintenance assistance — brief interruption with no extended impact.

opened_today.title: ML3 socks down — minimal detail provided
opened_today.summary: Socks reported down at 10:20 with no detail on component type, root cause, or line impact — acknowledgment received but no resolution documented.

opened_today.title: ML4 TG5 damaged belt causing intermittent line stops
opened_today.summary: TG5 belt damage caused intermittent line stops during startup — maintenance replaced belt in 21 minutes and line resumed normal operation.
